summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Finance Dashboard with RBAC. RBAC functionality works correctly (admin sees 60 transactions, user sees 30). Critical bug found: category filter is completely broken - selecting any category doesn't filter transactions. Search, date filters, sorting, dark mode, export, and mobile responsiveness all work correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Category filter dropdown selection doesn't filter transactions - selecting 'Food' still shows all 60 transactions instead of only Food category transactions
critical_bugs.impact: Core filtering functionality is broken, users cannot filter by category

ui_bugs.issue: Empty state shows icon and zero values but could have clearer 'No transactions found' message

passed_tests: RBAC - User role (Sarah Chen) sees only 30 transactions
Search filter works correctly (Grocery search shows 6 results)
Date range filters work (This Month: 20, Last Month: 20)
Sorting by date, category, amount works
Export dropdown and CSV/JSON options work
Empty state displays when no search results
success_percentage: frontend: 85% (9/10 major features working, 1 critical bug)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical category filter bug - the category dropdown selection is not filtering transactions. When 'Food' is selected, it should show only Food category transactions but currently shows all transactions. Check the useFilteredTransactions hook and category filter logic in TransactionTable.jsx.
